HERO_SUBHEADLINE: Bilingual wedding officiant for beach elopements, courthouse signings, backyards, and venues across Miami-Dade & Broward.
SOCIAL_PROOF_CEREMONIES: More than 100 happy couples last year
SERVICES_SECTION_SUBTITLE: From the sand to your backyard or favorite venue—personalized, legally sound ceremonies in English, Spanish, or both.
SERVICE_TYPE_BEACH_BODY: Sunrise or sunset elopements and micro-weddings on Miami Beach and across the coast—with a calm, organized flow so you can focus on each other.
SERVICE_TYPE_COURTHOUSE_BODY: Guidance on Florida marriage licenses and simple, dignified courthouse or quick legal ceremonies when you want efficiency without sacrificing heart.
SERVICE_TYPE_BACKYARD_BODY: Warm, intimate ceremonies at home—perfect for family gatherings and relaxed celebrations with bilingual scripting for every guest.
SERVICE_TYPE_VENUE_BODY: Coordination with your planner and venue team for seamless timing, sound checks, and a polished ceremony at South Florida’s top locations.
PACKAGE_INTIMATE_FEATURE_1: Discovery Call: 20 minutes discovery video session. To ensure that our philosophy aligns with your intentions.
PACKAGE_INTIMATE_FEATURE_3: One Symbolic Ritual: Choice of one signature ritual (Unity Sand, Light, or One we create).
PACKAGE_INTIMATE_FEATURE_4: Legal Marriage Integration: Full coordination with our Commissioned Notary for the legal "I do," license signing, and state filing.
PACKAGE_INTIMATE_FEATURE_5: Soul Certificate: A beautifully designed symbolic certificate as a keepsake of your spiritual commitment.
PACKAGE_SIGNATURE_FEATURE_2: "Honoring Mom & Dad" Ritual: A dedicated moment days before and during the ceremony to express gratitude and honor your lineage.
PACKAGE_SIGNATURE_FEATURE_3: Two Symbolic Rituals: signature rituals (Unity Sand, Light, or One we create).
PACKAGE_SIGNATURE_FEATURE_4: 2 Alignment Sessions (Online): Couple mentoring sessions to align your values, purpose, and communication.
PACKAGE_SIGNATURE_FEATURE_5: Vows Architecture Video: A private link to guide you in writing authentic vows.
PACKAGE_SIGNATURE_FEATURE_6: Previous Coordination: On-site with wedding planner and production sound.
PACKAGE_PREMIUM_FEATURE_2: Deep Immersion (Total of 5 Online Sessions): A comprehensive mentoring based on the V.A.S. Method (Vulnerability, Action, and Security).
PACKAGE_PREMIUM_FEATURE_3: Energetic Union Ritual: A private, 15-minute manifestation and intention-setting session held just before the ceremony.
PACKAGE_PREMIUM_FEATURE_4: Three Symbolic Rituals: Signature rituals (such as Unity Sand, Light, and One we create) to multi-dimensionally seal your union.
PACKAGE_PREMIUM_FEATURE_5: VIP Priority Access: Direct WhatsApp line for emotional support
PROCESS_TITLE: How Your Miami Wedding Ceremony Works
PROCESS_SUBTITLE: A clear three-step path from first call to “I do.”
PROCESS_STEP_1: We meet via video call to share your vision and secure your wedding date. We’ll discuss your custom love story and ceremony style in English, Spanish, or Bilingual.
PROCESS_STEP_2: You must obtain your license at any Florida Clerk of the Court office. Remember: Florida residents have a 3-day waiting period, while non-residents can marry the same day.
PROCESS_STEP_3: I arrive early, coordinate with your venue or planner, deliver your ceremony, and we sign and file your license promptly—often within 48 hours—so your marriage is official and you can celebrate.
PROCESS_STEP_4: After the 'I do,' we sign and handle the legal marriage filing within 48 hours. Your official marriage certificate will arrive by mail shortly after. We handle the paperwork; you enjoy the moment.
ABOUT_P1: I’m Juan Camilo, a Miami Wedding Officiant and expert Relationship Mentor with over 5 years of experience in couple counseling and organizational alignment. I believe that a wedding is more than a legal event; it is the sacred beginning of a shared life.
ABOUT_P2: By combining my background in emotional intelligence and relationship coaching with my role as a wedding officiant, I offer more than just words—I offer a foundation. I specialize in crafting personalized, bilingual ceremonies (English and Spanish) that reflect your unique journey, ensuring your 'I do' is as profound as your commitment.
ABOUT_P3: From intimate beach elopements to grand venue celebrations across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach, I provide a professional, stress-free experience rooted in heart and purpose.
AREAS_TITLE: Serving Miami-Dade, Broward and Palm Beach Countries
AREAS_SUBTITLE: Local ceremonies where you need them—from the beach to Brickell and beyond.
TESTIMONIALS_SUBTITLE: Real feedback from couples who trusted us with their ceremony.
TESTIMONIAL_1_QUOTE: We wanted a ceremony that felt personal and not like a script. He captured our story perfectly and kept our guests engaged the whole time. If you are getting married in Miami, look no further!
TESTIMONIAL_2_QUOTE: As a bride from out of state, I was worried about the legal requirements in Florida. He walked us through the marriage license process and delivered a stunning bilingual ceremony that our families loved.
TESTIMONIAL_3_QUOTE: Professional, punctual, and incredibly well-spoken. He worked seamlessly with our wedding planner and made the most important part of our day feel truly sacred.
FAQ_SUBTITLE: Straight answers to common questions about hiring a wedding officiant in Miami.
FAQ_Q_1: How much does a wedding officiant cost in Miami?
FAQ_A_1: Most couples invest between about $650 and $1,950 depending on preparation, rituals, previous support, and mentoring add-ons. Your package is chosen after a consultation so pricing matches your actual needs—not a one-size-fits-all quote.
FAQ_Q_2: Do you perform bilingual English and Spanish ceremonies?
FAQ_A_2: Yes. Ceremonies can be fully in English, fully in Spanish, or seamlessly bilingual so every guest feels included.
FAQ_Q_3: Can you marry us on the beach in Miami?
FAQ_A_3: Absolutely. Beach elopements and micro-weddings are a specialty. We’ll align on location rules, timing, and audio so your shoreline ceremony feels effortless.
FAQ_Q_4: What do we need for a Florida marriage license?
FAQ_A_4: You’ll obtain your license from any Florida Clerk of the Court. Florida residents typically have a 3-day waiting period; many non-residents can marry the same day. I’ll walk you through what applies to you during planning.
FAQ_A_5: We offer travel services across South Florida. Fees cover transportation, tolls, and dedicated travel time for your ceremony. Broward / Fort Lauderdale: +$100 USD - Palm Beach & Upper Keys: +$150 USD
CONTACT_SUBTITLE: Check availability—tell us your date, location, and vision. We’ll follow up to confirm details.
